context_rules.trigger_phrases: Exact phrase must appear in normalized transcript segment
context_rules.required_context: At least ONE of these clinically-specific action words must appear within 10 tokens of the matched phrase. Generic words like 'patient', 'session', 'treatment' are excluded — they fire on everything.
context_rules.exclude_if_present: If any of these appear in the same sentence as the match, suppress the code.

_meta.change_log: v2.0.0: Extended to cover every code in cpt_general_info.json (98 codes total). Removed 26 codes with no corresponding entry in cpt_general_info.json (ABA/BCBA codes, acupuncture, athletic training evaluations, and other out-of-scope codes). Added 39 new entries (SLP swallowing/AAC/voice codes, biofeedback, cardiac rehab, ROM measurement, motion analysis, telephone/online digital check-ins, remote therapeutic monitoring, caregiver direct-care G-codes, and wound e-stim/electromagnetic G-codes), with abbreviated cpt_general_info.json descriptions expanded to full CPT/HCPCS long descriptors. Fixed dangling ncci_conflicts/notes references left by removed codes (97032, 97129, 97545, 97597). | v2.1.0: Expanded trigger_phrases for all 86 actively-matched codes (12 engine-selected/add-on tier codes intentionally left empty) with additional natural-language, colloquial, and clinical-shorthand variants to improve real-world transcript matching.

90901.notes: Any modality except perineal/anorectal/urethral (use 90912 for pelvic floor). Untimed, per-day code — bill once regardless of session length.
90901.label: Biofeedback Training - Any Modality

trigger_phrases: pelvic floor muscle retraining with biofeedback
90912.notes: Perineal/anorectal/urethral biofeedback only, includes EMG and/or manometry when performed. First 15 min of one-on-one contact.
90912.label: Biofeedback Training - Perineal/Anorectal/Urethral (Initial 15 min)

92520.notes: Aerodynamic testing and acoustic testing of laryngeal/vocal function, combined under one code.
92520.label: Laryngeal Function Studies (Aerodynamic & Acoustic Testing)

92597.notes: Evaluation/fitting only, no therapeutic component. Distinct from 92609 (device programming/training).
92597.label: Voice Prosthetic Device Evaluation

92607.notes: First hour, face-to-face. Add-on 92608 for each additional 30 min. Distinct from 92609 (training/programming).
92607.label: AAC / Speech-Generating Device Evaluation - First Hour

92608.notes: Engine-generated add-on when 92607 evaluation exceeds the first hour. Do not match from speech.
92608.label: AAC / Speech-Generating Device Evaluation - Each Add'l 30 min

92609.notes: Ongoing therapeutic use/programming of an AAC device — not the initial evaluation.
92609.label: AAC / Speech-Generating Device Therapeutic Services

92610.notes: Clinical/bedside swallow evaluation, no instrumentation. Should not be billed same day as 92611.
92610.label: Swallowing Function Evaluation - Clinical/Bedside

92611.notes: Fluoroscopic/radiology-based swallow study. Radiology component (74230) billed separately.
92611.label: Swallowing Evaluation - Motion Fluoroscopy (MBSS)

92612.notes: FEES only, no laryngeal sensory testing. If combined with sensory testing in the same session, bill 92616 instead of stacking 92612 + 92614.
92612.label: Swallowing Evaluation - Flexible Endoscopic (FEES)

92614.notes: Laryngeal sensory testing only, without a swallowing evaluation. If combined with FEES, bill 92616.
92614.label: Flexible Endoscopic Laryngeal Sensory Testing

trigger_phrases: flexible endoscopic evaluation of swallowing and laryngeal sensory testing
combined endoscopic swallowing and sensory study
92616.notes: Combined FEES + laryngeal sensory testing, same session. Do not stack with 92612/92614.
92616.label: Swallowing Evaluation with Laryngeal Sensory Testing (FEES + FEEST)

93797.notes: Physician/QHP outpatient cardiac rehab services, no continuous ECG monitoring, per session. Not PT/OT/SLP — flag if detected in a rehab therapy session context.
93797.label: Cardiac Rehabilitation - Without Continuous ECG Monitoring

93798.notes: With continuous ECG/telemetry monitoring, per session. Not PT/OT/SLP — flag if detected in a rehab therapy session context.
93798.label: Cardiac Rehabilitation - With Continuous ECG Monitoring

trigger_phrases: range of motion measurement and report
95851.notes: Formal, reportable ROM measurement (separate procedure) for an extremity (excluding hand) or trunk section. Distinct from routine ROM assessed as part of an evaluation.
95851.label: Range of Motion Measurement - Extremity/Trunk

95852.notes: Formal, reportable ROM measurement (separate procedure) for the hand only.
95852.label: Range of Motion Measurement - Hand

95992.notes: Per day, untimed. For benign paroxysmal positional vertigo (BPPV).
95992.label: Canalith Repositioning Procedure

96000.notes: Video-taping and 3-D kinematics only. If dynamic plantar pressure measurement is also performed, bill 96001 instead.
96000.label: Comprehensive Motion Analysis - Video/3D Kinematics

trigger_phrases: instrumented gait analysis with foot pressure
96001.notes: 3-D kinematics plus dynamic plantar pressure measurements during walking.
96001.label: Comprehensive Motion Analysis - With Dynamic Plantar Pressure

96002.notes: Dynamic surface EMG during walking or other functional activities, 1-12 muscles.
96002.label: Dynamic Surface EMG - Walking/Functional Activities

96105.notes: Per hour, includes interpretation and report time (e.g., Boston Diagnostic Aphasia Examination).
96105.label: Aphasia Assessment

96125.notes: Per hour, includes face-to-face administration plus scoring/report time.
96125.label: Standardized Cognitive Performance Testing

97010.notes: Unattended modality. Flat per-session. No timer.
97010.label: Hot / Cold Packs

97022.notes: Do not confuse with 97036 Hubbard tank.
97022.label: Whirlpool

97032.notes: Therapist must be present and engaged throughout. Attended stim only — unattended stim is not separately reimbursable in this schema.
97032.label: Electrical Stimulation - Attended (Manual)

97033.notes: Drug delivery via current. Timed attended modality.
97033.label: Iontophoresis

97039.notes: Catchall attended modality. Must specify in documentation.
97039.label: Unlisted Attended Modality

97110.notes: Most common PT/OT timed code. Conflicts with 97530 on same body region — requires Mod 59.
97110.label: Therapeutic Exercise

97112.notes: Focus on neuromuscular control, balance, proprioception.
97112.label: Neuromuscular Reeducation

97113.notes: Pool-based exercise. Cannot bill 97110 for same activities.
97113.label: Aquatic Therapy

97116.notes: Includes stair training. Must document gait deviation and goals.
97116.label: Gait Training

97124.notes: Cannot bill with 97140 same region same day without Mod 59.
97124.label: Massage

97129.notes: OT/SLP only. Time-based code, billed in 15-minute increments per the 8-minute rule.
97129.label: Therapeutic Intervention - Cognitive Function (Initial 15 min)

97139.notes: Must specify procedure type in documentation.
97139.label: Unlisted Therapeutic Procedure

97140.notes: Hands-on only. High audit risk — document specific technique and joint.
97140.label: Manual Therapy

97150.notes: Requires 2+ patients simultaneously. Cannot bill individual timed codes for same patient same block.
97150.label: Therapeutic Procedure - Group

97161.notes: PT eval only. Complexity tier selected by clinician — flag for clinician to confirm during review.
97161.label: PT Evaluation - Low Complexity

97162.notes: Do not match from speech. Clinician selects complexity level.
97162.label: PT Evaluation - Moderate Complexity

97163.notes: Do not match from speech. Clinician selects complexity level.
97163.label: PT Evaluation - High Complexity

97164.notes: Must document significant clinical change. Cannot bill same day as initial eval.
97164.label: PT Re-Evaluation

97165.notes: OT eval. Complexity tier confirmed by clinician during review.
97165.label: OT Evaluation - Low Complexity

97166.notes: Do not match from speech. Clinician selects.
97166.label: OT Evaluation - Moderate Complexity

97167.notes: Do not match from speech. Clinician selects.
97167.label: OT Evaluation - High Complexity

97168.notes: Must document plan of care change.
97168.label: OT Re-Evaluation

97530.notes: Functional task-based. Distinct from 97110 — must document functional goal, not isolated exercise.
97530.label: Therapeutic Activities

97535.notes: ADL and compensatory strategies. OT primary domain.
97535.label: Self-Care / Home Management Training

97550.notes: Direct contact with CAREGIVER, not patient. First 30 min.
97550.label: Caregiver Training - First 30 Min

97597.notes: Selective debridement, first 20 sq cm or less of total wound surface area, per session.
97597.label: Wound Debridement ≤20 sq cm

97605.notes: Non-disposable system ≤50 sq cm. Engine selects 97606 if >50 sq cm noted.
97605.label: NPWT Non-Disposable ≤50 sq cm

97606.notes: Engine-selected when wound documentation indicates >50 sq cm.
97606.label: NPWT Non-Disposable >50 sq cm

97608.notes: Engine-selected for disposable system >50 sq cm.
97608.label: NPWT Disposable >50 sq cm

97750.notes: Written report REQUIRED. Flag for documentation compliance.
97750.label: Physical Performance Test / Measurement

97760.notes: Initial orthotic training. Subsequent visits use 97763.
97760.label: Orthotic Management - Initial

97799.notes: Requires special report. Manual payor review.
97799.label: Unlisted PM&R Service

trigger_phrases: called the patient to discuss symptoms
98966.notes: 5-10 min telephone assessment & management by a non-physician QHP. Not billable if it leads to a visit within 24 hrs or originates from one within the previous 7 days. Higher time bands (98967: 11-20 min, 98968: 21-30 min) are engine-selected by documented call duration.
98966.label: Telephone Assessment & Management - 5-10 min

98967.notes: Engine-selected when documented telephone assessment & management duration is 11-20 min. Do not match from speech directly.
98967.label: Telephone Assessment & Management - 11-20 min

98968.notes: Engine-selected when documented telephone assessment & management duration is 21-30 min. Do not match from speech directly.
98968.label: Telephone Assessment & Management - 21-30 min

98970.notes: 5-10 cumulative min over 7 days, non-physician QHP online digital assessment & management. Higher bands (98971: 11-20 min, 98972: 21+ min) are engine-selected by cumulative documented time.
98970.label: Online Digital Assessment & Management - 5-10 min

98971.notes: Engine-selected when cumulative documented online digital assessment & management time (7-day window) is 11-20 min. Do not match from speech directly.
98971.label: Online Digital Assessment & Management - 11-20 min

98972.notes: Engine-selected when cumulative documented online digital assessment & management time (7-day window) is 21+ min. Do not match from speech directly.
98972.label: Online Digital Assessment & Management - 21+ min

98975.notes: Billed once per episode of care (until treatment goals are met). Requires documented device education.
98975.label: Remote Therapeutic Monitoring - Initial Setup & Patient Education

trigger_phrases: reviewed rtm data with the patient
98979.notes: 10-19 min/calendar month, requires at least one real-time interactive communication. Mutually exclusive with 98980 — do not bill both in the same month. 98980 is engine-selected when time reaches 20+ min.
98979.label: RTM Treatment Management - 10-19 min/month

98980.notes: Engine-selected when documented RTM treatment management time reaches 20+ minutes/month. Requires at least one real-time interactive communication. Do not match from speech directly.
98980.label: RTM Treatment Management - 20+ min/month

G0281.notes: Unattended e-stim for chronic Stage III/IV pressure, arterial, diabetic, or venous stasis ulcers not demonstrating healing after 30 days of conventional care.
G0281.label: Unattended Electrical Stimulation - Chronic Wound/Pressure Ulcer

G0283.notes: Unattended e-stim for indications other than wound care. Use G0281 if a wound/ulcer indication is documented.
G0283.label: Unattended Electrical Stimulation - Non-Wound Indication

trigger_phrases: pulsed electromagnetic field therapy for wound
pulsed electromagnetic field for pressure sore
G0329.notes: For chronic Stage III/IV pressure, arterial, diabetic, or venous stasis ulcers not demonstrating healing after 30 days of conventional care.
G0329.label: Electromagnetic Therapy - Chronic Wound/Pressure Ulcer

G0451.notes: Per standardized instrument form, with interpretation and report (e.g., ASQ, Bayley).
G0451.label: Developmental Testing with Interpretation & Report

trigger_phrases: direct care skills training without patient present
caregiver training for wound care tasks
G0541.notes: Direct/hands-on caregiving skills (e.g. wound care, positioning, infection control) without patient present, face-to-face. Full 30 min required. Distinct from 97550 (therapeutic/behavioral caregiver training).
G0541.label: Caregiver Direct Care Training (No Patient Present) - Initial 30 min

trigger_phrases: group caregiver training without patient present
G0543.notes: Untimed, billed once per patient represented. Direct care skills training for multiple caregiver sets without patients present.
G0543.label: Group Caregiver Direct Care Training (No Patient Present)

trigger_phrases: reviewed the video the patient sent
G2250.notes: Asynchronous store-and-forward review of patient-submitted video/images. Must follow up with the patient within 24 business hours.
G2250.label: Remote Assessment of Patient-Submitted Recorded Video/Images

G2251.notes: 5-10 min brief real-time check-in by a QHP who cannot report E&M services. Overlaps conceptually with 98966 (telephone A&M) — code choice is often payer-specific; confirm which set applies.
G2251.label: Brief Virtual Check-In - 5-10 min
